Who We Are

BUILT FOR THE STREETS.
WORN BY THE BOLD.

KRUX is Karachi's statement streetwear brand — raw, real, and unapologetically bold. Every piece is designed for those who live life on their own terms.

Karachi's boldest streetwear brand. Built for the streets, made for those who dare to stand out.

Est. 2024

THE STORY
BEHIND KRUX

KRUX was born from the streets of Karachi — a city of raw energy, grit, and unapologetic self-expression. We saw a gap in the market for streetwear that truly spoke to the bold, the fearless, and the authentic.

Every design we create is a statement. From our heavyweight graphic tees to our hand-selected accessories, every piece carries the KRUX spirit: wear it loud, wear it proud.

We are not just clothing — we are a movement for those who refuse to blend in.

100+
Designs
2K+
Happy Customers
3
Categories

What We Stand For

OUR VALUES

🔥
Authenticity
Every piece is designed in-house. No copies, no compromise. KRUX is 100% original, always.
⚡
Bold Design
We don't do subtle. Our graphics are loud, our cuts are sharp, and our attitude is unapologetic.
💪
Quality Built
From the fabric weight to the stitching, KRUX pieces are made to last on the streets and beyond.

Karachi's boldest streetwear brand. Built for the streets, made for those who dare to stand out.

Legal & Policies

POLICIES

Last Updated: June 2025

Information We Collect

When you contact us or place an order, we may collect your name, email address, phone number, and any other information you provide voluntarily.

  • Contact details (email, WhatsApp number)
  • Order and transaction information
  • Communication history with our team

How We Use Your Information

Your data is used solely to process your orders, respond to your inquiries, and improve our services. We do not sell or share your personal information with third parties.

Data Security

We take reasonable steps to protect your information. All communications through WhatsApp and email are private and are not shared without your consent.

Contact for Privacy Concerns

If you have any questions about your data, please reach out at zngaming8899@gmail.com or WhatsApp 03450831863 during business hours (10am – 5pm).

Return Eligibility

  • Items must be returned within 7 days of delivery
  • Items must be unworn, unwashed, and in original condition
  • Original tags must still be attached
  • Sale items are non-refundable

How to Initiate a Return

Contact us via WhatsApp at 03450831863 or email zngaming8899@gmail.com with your order details and reason for return.

We will review your request and respond between 10:00 AM – 5:00 PM (Mon–Sat).

Refund Processing

Once the returned item is received and inspected, we will process your exchange or refund within 5–7 business days.

Delivery Areas

We currently ship across Pakistan via trusted courier partners including TCS, Leopards, and Trax.

Delivery Timeframes

  • Karachi: 1–2 business days
  • Major cities (Lahore, Islamabad, Rawalpindi): 2–4 business days
  • Other areas: 4–7 business days

Shipping Charges

Shipping charges are calculated at checkout based on your delivery location. Free shipping is available on orders above a minimum threshold — ask us on WhatsApp for current offers.

Order Tracking

Once your order is dispatched, we will share your tracking number via WhatsApp or email so you can monitor your delivery.

Use of Our Platform

By browsing this website and contacting KRUX, you agree to our terms. This site is for personal, non-commercial use only.

Intellectual Property

All designs, logos, and graphics displayed on this website are the property of KRUX Streetwear. Unauthorized reproduction or use is strictly prohibited.

Limitation of Liability

KRUX is not responsible for delays caused by courier services, natural disasters, or other events beyond our control. We will always do our best to resolve any issues promptly.

Governing Law

These terms are governed by the laws of Pakistan. Any disputes shall be subject to the jurisdiction of courts in Karachi, Sindh.
